description: Source contract for TV3 flight profiles. A flight profile describes a repeatable simulator or flight scenario for a selected vehicle. Profiles are separate from vehicle manifests so geometry, hardware, propulsion, and control configuration stay in config/vehicles while scenario targets can be swapped.

consumed_now.guidance: shallow overlay on the selected vehicle manifest guidance block
consumed_now.mission_profile: shallow overlay on the selected vehicle manifest mission_profile block

required: vehicle name from config/vehicles, for example tv3_v1 or tv3_lander_v1
type, for example ascent, ignition_sequence, hover_window, waypoint_track, landing_approach, abort_fault
intent, a short reason this scenario exists
acceptance criteria or review metrics before claiming the scenario passed

commands.note: Optional future command timeline. This is where launch, abort, reset, fault injection, and offboard/GCS events should be described before scripts execute them automatically.

environment.note: Optional future wind, gravity, sensor noise, and initial condition settings.

review.note: Optional required ULog topics, plots, and pass/fail metrics for archived runs.
